folio.label: 134v
folio.l: That in his hote , declinacioun
Shoon , as the burned gold , witú stremes brigút
But now in Capricorn , a doun he lygút
Where as he shon ful pale , I dar wel seyn
The bittre frostes , witú the Sleet and reyn
Destroyed hatú the grene , in euäy ©erd
Ianus syt by the fyre , witú double berd
And drynketú of his bugle horn , the wyn
Biforn hi~ stant Brawn , of the tusked swyn
And nowel crietú , euäy lusty man
¢ Aurelius , in al that euäe he can
Dotú to this Maister , chiere and reuäence
And preietú hi~ , to doon his diligence
To bryngen hi~ , out of theisehisetheisehise peynes smerte
Or witú a swerd , that he wold slitte his herte
¢ This subtil Clerk , swicú routhe had of this man
That nygút and day , he spedde hi~ that he can
To wayten a tyme , of his conclusioun
This is to seyn , to make illusioun
By swicú an apparence , or Iogelrie
I ne can no termes , of Astrologie
That she and euäy wygút , shulde wene and seye
That of Brytaigne , the Rokkes were a weye
Or elles they were sonken , vnder grounde
So at the laste , he hatú his tyme I founde
To make his Iapes , and his wrechednesse
Of swicú a su¹sticies , cursednesse
His tables tolletanes , fortú he brougút
Ful wel corrected , ne there lakked nougút
Neither his collect , ne his expans ©eres
Ne hise rootes , ne hise othere geres
As ben hise centris , and hise argumentez
And hise ¸porcionelles , conuenientez
For hise equaciouns , in euäy thyngö
And by his eighte Spere , in his werkyngö
He knew ful wel , how fer alnatú was shoue
Fro the hed , of thilk fixe Aries a boue
That in the .ix. spere , considered is
Ful subtilly , he kalculed al this
Whan he had founde , his first mansioun
He knewe the remenaunt , by ¸porcioun
And knew the a risyngö , of his Mone wel
And in whos face and täme , and euäydel
And knew ful wele , the Mones mansioun
Acordaunt , to his operacioun
And knew also , hise othere obseruaunces
